Ring Codes
At this time all I have to offer is the text code, which is really a preference for most webmasters anyway. Within the next week or so, official logo code fragments will be posted.

This is an HTMLfragment to be pasted at the bottom of your webpage for the Anime Radar Ciruit WebRing. It is what links you to the rest of the ring.

Replace the ID # below with your given ID.

<p> <center> This <a href="http://www.angelfire.com/ca2/dbzunlimited/myring.html">Anime Radar Ciruit</a> site owned by <a href="mailto:you@domain.com"></a>. <br> [ <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;id=1;prev5">Previous 5 Sites</a> | <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;id=1;prev">Previous</a> | <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;id=1;next">Next</a> | <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;id=1;next5">Next 5 Sites</a> | <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;random">Random Site</a> | <a href="http://nav.webring.org/cgi-bin/navcgi?ring=aniradar;list">List Sites</a> ] </center> <p> What it looks like:

This Anime Radar Ciruit site owned by .
